summary: Revenue & Supplier Optimization Engine (Iteration 84) - Complete testing of all 13 new API endpoints under /api/revenue/* and 2 new frontend dashboard pages. All 38 backend tests PASS (100%). Both frontend pages render correctly with all UI components.
critical_code_review_comments: All 13 revenue endpoints properly require authentication (401/403 for unauthenticated requests)
GET /api/revenue/supplier-analytics returns supplier revenue data with days parameter support
GET /api/revenue/profitability-scores returns scores with tiers (platinum, gold, silver, bronze) and 5 components
POST /api/revenue/supplier-selection returns ranked suppliers with weighted scores (price: 0.35, reliability: 0.25, profitability: 0.25, preference: 0.15)
GET /api/revenue/markup-rules returns active rules (default rules exist when no custom rules)
POST /api/revenue/markup-rules creates/updates rules with rule_type, target, markup_pct, priority
POST /api/revenue/calculate-markup applies rules and returns base_price, total_markup, final_price, applied_rules
GET /api/revenue/supplier-economics returns combined economics (revenue + profitability + performance)
GET /api/revenue/agency-analytics returns agency revenue analytics with preferred suppliers
GET /api/revenue/forecast returns revenue_forecast, booking_forecast with confidence levels (high/medium/low)
GET /api/revenue/business-kpi returns complete dashboard data (gmv, commission, funnel, top_suppliers, profitability, top_destinations)
Agency admin role (agency_admin) can access supplier-selection and calculate-markup endpoints
Admin-only endpoints correctly restrict access (agency admin gets 403 on admin endpoints)
Default profitability scores returned when no booking data exists (expected behavior)
Default markup rules returned when no custom rules in database

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render and interact correctly)

test_credentials: Super Admin: agent@acenta.test / agent123, Agency Admin: agency1@demo.test / agency123
seed_data_creation: Created test markup rules during testing (test_rule_*, test_delete_rule_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Revenue & Supplier Optimization Engine (iteration 84) fully tested. Key features verified: 1) All 13 /api/revenue/* endpoints working with proper authentication, 2) Supplier Economics page (/app/admin/supplier-economics) renders with 6 commission cards, 3 tabs (Genel Bakis, Karlilik Skoru, Markup Kurallari), profitability table with tier badges, 3) Revenue Optimization page (/app/admin/revenue-optimization) renders with 6 GMV cards, 4 tabs (Genel Bakis, Tahmin, Acenta Analizi, Supplier Geliri), conversion funnel, popular destinations, profitability ranking, 4) Period selector and refresh button work correctly, 5) Navigation items 'Supplier Ekonomisi' and 'Gelir Optimizasyonu' are in adminNav.js under SISTEM YONETIMI section.

backend_apis.GET /api/revenue/profitability-scores: PASS - Returns scores with tiers and 5 components
backend_apis.POST /api/revenue/supplier-selection: PASS - Revenue-aware ranking with weighted scores

supplier_economics_ui.tabs: PASS - 3 tabs: Genel Bakis, Karlilik Skoru, Markup Kurallari
supplier_economics_ui.profitability_table: PASS - Table with supplier scores, tiers (SILVER, BRONZE), and component scores
supplier_economics_ui.profitability_cards: PASS - Score bars with tier badges and component breakdown
supplier_economics_ui.markup_rules_panel: PASS - Rules table with delete button
supplier_economics_ui.economics_table: PASS - Supplier economic overview with revenue, profitability, performance

revenue_optimization_ui.gmv_cards: PASS - 6 GMV cards (GMV Brut Hacim, Platform Geliri, Toplam Rezervasyon, Ort. Rez. Degeri, Aktif Acenta, Aktif Supplier)
revenue_optimization_ui.tabs: PASS - 4 tabs: Genel Bakis, Tahmin, Acenta Analizi, Supplier Geliri
revenue_optimization_ui.conversion_funnel: PASS - Donusum Hunisi with Arama, Goruntuleme, Secim, Rez. Baslat, Onay steps
revenue_optimization_ui.popular_destinations: PASS - Populer Destinasyonlar with search counts
revenue_optimization_ui.profitability_ranking: PASS - Karlilik Siralamasi with ranked suppliers and tier badges
revenue_optimization_ui.forecast_panel: PASS - Gelir and Rezervasyon Tahmini with confidence indicators

authorization.all_endpoints_protected: PASS - All 13 revenue endpoints return 401/403 without auth
authorization.agency_can_access_selection: PASS - agency_admin can access supplier-selection and calculate-markup
authorization.agency_restricted_from_admin: PASS - agency_admin correctly denied access to admin-only endpoints

mocked_note: No mocked APIs. Revenue data is based on actual unified_bookings collection (currently empty in test environment). Default profitability scores and markup rules are returned when no data exists (expected behavior).
